query:
_index=sec_signal {{{keywords}}}

| if (isempty(suppressedreasons),"NO","YES") as suppressed
| if(suppressed="YES",1,0) as is_suppressed
| if(suppressed="NO",1,0) as is_generated

| concat (ruleid," ",rulename) as rule

| sum(is_suppressed) as suppressed,sum(is_generated)  as generated by rule | sort generated 
| suppressed + generated as t | sort t | limit 25 | fields -t
//| transpose row {{graph_by}} column suppressed,generated
